title: Airbus A320 prebuilt parts source discovery seed

sourcePools.allowedUse: Find downloadable CC Attribution candidate meshes for inspection after source approval.
sourcePools.limitations: Each model must be reviewed for license, author, download availability, file format, mesh quality, and aircraft accuracy before download.

sourcePools.allowedUse: Find open-source simulator cockpit packages and hierarchy references for component extraction planning.
sourcePools.limitations: GPL assets are simulator-source proxy candidates; do not execute downloaded scripts or treat as production geometry authority.

sourcePools.allowedUse: Find STL/F3D home-cockpit part candidates for FCU, EFIS, knobs, RMP, transponder, side-stick cabinet, and pedestal controls.
sourcePools.limitations: Printable parts may be mechanically useful but need license review and visual cleanup before web runtime use.

requestedComponents.label: cockpit shell and main panel blockout
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Prefer downloadable A320 cockpit meshes with manageable polygon counts and visible main panel/glareshield relationships.

requestedComponents.label: pilot or first-officer chair
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Prefer standalone chair assets with clear license and texture/material evidence.

requestedComponents.label: FCU/glareshield and autopilot panel parts
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Prefer downloadable meshes or printable panel sets that can inform A320 FCU proportions after reference review.

requestedComponents.label: side-stick, side-stick mount, or side cabinet candidates
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Prefer first-officer-relevant sidestick area parts; record if only captain-side or simulator-mount parts are found.

requestedComponents.label: pedestal, RMP, transponder, knobs, and throttle-related parts
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Prefer A320-specific printable or mesh parts for pedestal controls; no assembly until source approval.
